layoutRegions.name: lifecycle-summary
layoutRegions.purpose: Readiness counts for tracked secrets, current proofs, review items, and retire paths.

layoutRegions.name: lifecycle-ledger
layoutRegions.purpose: Secret birth, owner, rotation cadence, and lifecycle state inventory.

layoutRegions.name: attestation-and-drift-panels
layoutRegions.purpose: Owner attestations, consumer drift, deletion readiness, and policy-safe lifecycle changes.

components.name: SecretCard
components.purpose: Focusable secret lifecycle card with birth date, owner, cadence, and state.
interactions: state badge distinguishes current, review, and retire paths
owner names wrap without resizing sibling cards

components.name: OwnerAttestation
components.purpose: Owner scope, attestation evidence, and next review date.
interactions: focus state is visible for keyboard review
review and retire states remain visually distinct

components.name: ConsumerDrift
components.purpose: Consumer expected version, observed version, and required lifecycle action.
interactions: observed secret versions wrap without horizontal overflow

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
